project.title: LLM-Based Dynamic Black-Box Testing for LexAI REST APIs

equivalence_partitions.description: Optional field provided with a valid value.
Field uses one of the documented enum values.
Field uses an enum value outside the documented domain.
Optional field provided with a valid value.
Optional field omitted and server applies default value 0.
Optional field omitted and server applies default value 20.

boundary_values.rationale: Boundary set around the lower effective limit.
Boundary set around the lower effective limit.
Boundary set around the upper effective limit.

decision_table.expected_result: Request still succeeds and the server normalizes the parameter.
Request still succeeds and the server normalizes the parameter.

test_cases.title: Baseline valid request
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response with valid business payload.

test_cases.title: Invalid enum for status
test_cases.expected_result: FAILED response because enum value is outside the accepted domain.

test_cases.title: Omit optional field page for default handling
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response and server applies default value for page.

test_cases.title: Lower boundary for page = -1
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response with normalized lower bound behavior.

test_cases.title: Lower boundary for page = 0
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response at lower boundary.

test_cases.title: Lower boundary for page = 1
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response just above lower boundary.

test_cases.title: Omit optional field size for default handling
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response and server applies default value for size.

test_cases.title: Lower boundary for size = 0
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response with normalized lower bound behavior.

test_cases.title: Lower boundary for size = 1
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response at lower boundary.

test_cases.title: Lower boundary for size = 2
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response just above lower boundary.

test_cases.title: Upper boundary for size = 99
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response just below upper boundary.

test_cases.title: Upper boundary for size = 100
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response at upper boundary.

test_cases.title: Upper boundary for size = 101
test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response with normalized upper bound behavior.

test_cases.title: Baseline valid request

body.question: Can an employer terminate a fixed-term contract early?
facts: The employee has worked for 8 months.

test_cases.expected_result: SUCCESS response with valid business payload.

facts: The employee has worked for 8 months.

test_cases.expected_result: FAILED response with field-level validation error.

facts: The employee has worked for 8 months.

test_cases.expected_result: FAILED response because blank text violates non-blank validation.
